title: This Ex-Quant Had to Quit Wall Street to Build a 24/7 Stock Exchange | QFEX, Annanay Kapila
summary: Annanay Kapila, an ex-quantitative trader who managed $10 billion in daily trading volume, critiques high-frequency trading as adding no value and extracting billions through market structural flaws. He left Wall Street to build QFEX, a 24/7 global stock exchange, arguing that top talent is trapped in finance by golden handcuffs rather than pursuing meaningful work.
